subject: 1f2ca4640365b2c4d36166b1fda9766e598fa20ff198623afe07e8940014df1050616e676561207820416672696361
name: Africa
description:
Step into the world of collaboration as ADA Handle, with its custom and human-readable address, joins forces with Cardano Women under the Pangea Project. This unique NFT collaboration blends the digital frontier with the essence of global unity.

The background artwork showcases outlines of the seven continents, prominently featuring Africa, a significant component of the ancient supercontinent Pangea's Gondwana subcontinent. This representation offers a glimpse into the interconnectedness of land masses before the geographical divisions we know today, symbolizing the unity of cultures and communities across historical epochs.

Rather than resembling our modern continents, the artwork evokes the geopolitical landscape of Pangea, presenting a unique perspective on the world's unity in its pre-divided state.

As time progresses, the artwork aims to evolve, becoming more granular to reference specific places such as states or countries as we recognize them today. This dynamic evolution mirrors the ever-changing nature of our world and the intricate relationships that bind us together.

Experience the fusion of art, technology, and community engagement in this collaboration between ADA Handle and Cardano Women. Embark on a journey towards greater inclusivity and understanding, exploring the rich history and interconnectedness of Africa within the broader context of global unity.
